state.next-action: Phase 44 evolution pass complete 2026-04-14. Closed today: 44-15, 44-17, 44-25, 44-27, 44-29, 44-04/05, 44-01/02/03. Snapshot/state trim in flight (this turn). Next pick: 44-26 or 44-28 discuss-phase, or continue snapshot trim if more remains.
